edit_email.title: Edit email address
edit_email.desc: This email will be used for communication and account recovery.
backup_codes.title: Manage backup codes
backup_codes.desc: To generate new backup codes (which will invalidate the old ones), please confirm your password.
disable_2fa.title: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
disable_2fa.desc: To disable 2FA, please enter your password and a valid 2FA code or backup code.
change_nick.title: Change nickname
change_nick.desc: You may change your nickname once every 30 days.
change_pass.title: Change password
delete_account.desc: Are you sure you wish to delete your account? This action cannot be undone!
login.captcha_desc: Too many attempts. Please confirm you are human:
reset.title: Reset password
setup_2fa.title: Set up 2FA
setup_2fa.scan: Scan this QR code in your authenticator app:
setup_2fa.backup_info: If you forget your password or lose access to 2FA, you will need these.
notif.launcher_update_available: A new launcher version ({0}) is available. Would you like to update now?
notif.setup_missing: Installer executable is missing! Unable to update.
notif.game_installed: The game has been successfully installed/updated to version {0}!
notif.game_latest: The game is up to date!
notif.server_info_missing: Server information for the selected game branch could not be found!
notif.update_check_error: An error occurred whilst checking for updates: {0}
notif.uninstall_prompt: Are you sure you wish to uninstall ThermoriaVerse ({0})? This action cannot be undone and will delete the game files from the installation folder.
notif.session_expired: Session expired. Please log in again.
notif.login_required_friends: You must be logged in to view your friends list!
notif.uninstall_launcher_prompt: Are you sure you wish to uninstall the AthermoBase launcher and delete all of its files?
notif.enter_user_pass: Please enter your username and password.
notif.incorrect_captcha_human: Incorrect security response. Please confirm you are human.
notif.session_limit: You have reached the limit of 5 active sessions! Please log out from other devices, or change your password.
notif.2fa_required: Two-Factor Authentication is enabled. Please enter the code.
notif.invalid_credentials: Invalid username or password, or incorrect 2FA code.
notif.invalid_nickname_format: Nickname must consist of 3 to 16 alphanumeric characters.
notif.invalid_password_format: Your password must be at least 8 characters long and cannot contain spaces.
notif.setup_complete: Setup complete! Please ensure you have securely saved your backup codes.
notif.fill_all_reset: Please fill in all fields to reset your password.
notif.password_updated: Your password has been updated! You may now log in.
notif.reset_failed: Failed to reset password. Please check your details or codes.
notif.logout_all_success: Successfully logged out from all devices.
notif.enter_both_passwords: Please enter both your current and new passwords.
notif.new_password_format: The new password must be at least 8 characters in length, cannot contain spaces, and must include special characters.
notif.password_changed: Password changed. Your other devices have been logged out.
notif.provide_pass_and_code: Please provide your password and code.
notif.account_deleted: Your account has been successfully deleted.
notif.delete_failed: Failed to delete account. Please try again later. Code: {0}
notif.not_logged_in_play: Cannot start the game, you are not logged in!
notif.session_token_missing: Error: Missing session token. Please log in again.
notif.session_revoked: The device has been successfully logged out.
notif.session_revoke_failed: An error occurred whilst logging out the device.
notif.patreon_sync_error: Sync error. Please relink your Patreon account.
notif.patreon_linking_started: Patreon login opened in browser. Refresh when finished!
